questions.question: Name the two main couples on the 60's cartoon The Flintstones.
questions.answer: Fred and Wilma Flintstone, Barney and Betty Rubble

questions.question: What was the name for the type of telephone where numbers were dialed by spinning a disk on the unit and allowing the disk to recoil?
What singer achieved fame with songs such as "Both Sides Now," and "Send in the Clowns"?
In 1962, what Philadelphia Warrior scored a record 100 points in a single game?
If someone said, "Don't flip your wig," what did they mean?
questions.answer: Don't get so excited or mad; stay calm
